lines.text: Beachcomber Shacks Deluxe - After Hours Event | Walt Disney World Resort
Beachcomber Shacks Deluxe - After Hours Event
Unwind in a private area with comfortable seating during Disney H2O Glow After Hours at Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon—select nights June 2 to September 5, 2026.
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Renting a Beachcomber Shack is a great way for your group to relax together during a fun evening event at Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon water park.
Each Beachcomber Shack Deluxe accommodates a maximum of 12 Guests and includes the following amenities:
Cushioned seating for up to 8 Guests
Attendants are on hand to take your food and beverage orders (separate dining charges apply) and help you make the most out of the water park.
For an enhanced experience, consider booking the Beachcomber Shacks Premium Plus instead—which features even more great amenities.
Advance reservations are highly recommended as Beachcomber Shacks book quickly—and are available on a first-come, first-served basis.
To inquire about same-day availability during Disney H2O Glow After Hours at Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon, please visit Singapore Sal's after 6:00 PM.
Beachcomber Shacks Deluxe cost $215 plus tax during Disney H2O Glow After Hours at Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon.
Valid Disney H2O Glow After Hours at Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon admission is required.
One Guest in the party must be at least 18 years old.
Guests who need to cancel Beachcomber Shack reservations must provide 24-hour advance notice. The full price of your reservation will be charged in the event of no-shows or same-day cancellations.
Rentals may be cancelled by the water park due to inclement weather. If this occurs, Guests will not be charged.
Availability of amenities may change without notice. Please check at the time of booking to confirm what will be provided.
Beachcomber Shacks Standard — After Hours Event
Stretch out and relax in a private area during the Disney H2O Glow After Hours at Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon event.
Beachcomber Shacks Premium Plus — After Hours Event
Kick back in a private area complete with flat-screen TV and mini fridge during the Disney H2O Glow After Hours at Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon event.
